subject: An undead reaper — a zombified humanoid with a cracked, hollow-eyed skull head, draped in tattered robes over plate armor, brandishing a long curved scythe-bladed polearm. A second shadowy figure looms behind it.
description: A gaunt undead figure dominates the frame, its head a cracked, eyeless skull lit faintly from within. It wears layered tattered robes in deep blues and browns over ribbed plate armor at the shoulders and chest. Both bony hands grip the haft of a long polearm tipped with a wickedly curved blade — a reaper's scythe rendered as a battlefield weapon. The pose is mid-stride, the weapon raised across the body. Behind the main figure, a second indistinct silhouette is visible in the gloom, suggesting an army of similar reapers receding into the dark. The palette is overwhelmingly cold blacks, slate grays, and muted blues with rust accents on the metalwork. The background dissolves into smoky shadow with no clear horizon — a void-like battlefield. The mood is grim and funereal, befitting a soul-harvesting servant of death.
foreground: Skull-headed undead reaper in tattered robes and plate, gripping a long curved-blade scythe-polearm
background: Smoky black void with a second shadowed reaper figure barely visible behind
emotion: implacable, soulless menace; pose reads as advancing executioner
